name: team cpoe from plays range year_offset pools numerator/denominator (wrap)
description: Team variant AVG carve-out under wrap mode: the AVG(cpoe) season render becomes SUM(cpoe)/SUM(non-null) in the range path, projected as num/den through the pid-keyed wrap _team_stats CTE and pooled by the range correlated subquery.
expected_query: with "tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(cpoe) as team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_numerator, SUM(CASE WHEN cpoe IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_denominator, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024, 2025) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024, 2025) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2024, 2025) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a_team_stats" as materialized (select "player_year_teams"."pid", sum(tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a.team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_numerator) as team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_numerator, sum(tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a.team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_denominator) as team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_denominator from "tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a" inner join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."team" = "tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a"."nfl_team" and "player_year_teams"."year" = "tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a"."year" group by "player_year_teams"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT SUM(tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a_team_stats.team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_numerator) / NULLIF(SUM(tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a_team_stats.team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_denominator), 0) FROM tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a_team_stats WHERE tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a_team_stats.pid = player.pid) AS "team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2025 group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
